name: Ventec International Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ventec International Group Co., Ltd. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells copper clad laminates, aluminum-backed laminates, and prepreg bonding materials. Its products include standard FR4, lead free assembly, halogen free products, tec-thermal/thermal management and insulated metal substrate, thermal interface material, polyimide, tec-speed/signal integrity products, flex/flex rigid products, plastic interleaver and release film consumables, drill entry and exit material, copper foils and ACF, and masslam and drill products, as well as products for special applications. The company's products are used for the fabrication of various printed circuit board applications. It also engages in general investment and international trade business. The company operates in China, the United Kingdom, the United States, Germany, and Taiwan. Ventec International Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Grand Cayman, the Cayman Islands.
